whatsNew:
• Pre-warmed stream manifest cache in the Discover feed to open and buffer videos almost instantly
• Combined video track sizes with audio track sizes to display accurate download file sizes for 4K/8K streams
• Preferred H.264 streams over AV1/VP9 to prevent black-screen playback issues on older devices
• Ensured proper file extensions (.mp3, .mp4, .m4a) for downloaded files with automatic format fallbacks
